rationale: No new escalation near Romania's borders; US-Iran deal marginally positive for energy costs; Xi-Kim meeting a distant geopolitical signal.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: Potential easing of oil prices if deal holds; minor indirect benefit for Romanian energy costs and inflation.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang
top_events.summary: China-North Korea alignment strengthened; distant but relevant to Black Sea regional security axis involving Russia.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea
top_events.summary: No new escalation this cycle; ongoing background pressure for Romania.
